programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 5 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''5 Chefs Compete'' - Using discarded everyday objects, a rock band treats the contestants to a musical number. The chefs are then given thirty minutes to make restaurant-ready dishes from leftovers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 4 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''4 Chefs Compete'' - The remaining chefs participate in the "taste it, now make it" challenge. The winner dines out with guests the losers move furniture and prep the kitchen for dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - Winner Chosen
programme.desc: ''Winner Chosen'' - The final two chefs attend an L.A. night club to compete in their final challenge: prepare two appetizers and three entrées in one hour. Five iconic chefs will judge the dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 18 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''18 Chefs Compete'' - The new contestants form two teams and make their signature dishes for Chef Ramsay. A large audience looks on at the Cinerama Dome theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 17 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''17 Chefs Compete'' - This episode's challenge? Re-create Chef Ramsay's geoduck sashimi. The team that prepares fifteen perfect dishes gets a pool break while the losing team makes dinner for everyone.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 16 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''16 Chefs Compete'' - In a challenge to improve communication skills, Chef Ramsay gives each contestant a jacket with a recipe printed on the back, which they need to rely on their teammates to read.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 15 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''15 Chefs Compete'' - The teams serve brunch to a class of graduating culinary students. The winners fly to San Francisco to dine at Atelier Crenn the losers grind and stuff chorizo sausages.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 14 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''14 Chefs Compete'' - The chefs must identify mystery proteins and match them to dishes. The winners meet Olympic gold medalists at the Annenberg Community Beach House.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 13 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''13 Chefs Compete'' - The contestants split into pairs and capture animals. The chefs have to prepare a side to go with the protein that they just caught.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 12 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''12 Chefs Compete'' - The teams create six Italian opera-inspired dishes. The winners go on a shopping spree at American Rag Cie, while the losers break down squid for a squid-ink tortellini dish.

programme.title: Baywatch - Stone Cold
programme.desc: "Stone Cold" - A plane carrying a donor heart crashes, and it’s up to Jason to makes a desperate dive to retrieve the heart before the patient dies. Two hooligans steal a car and end up trapped underwater. Jenna tries to get Leigh to turn against Sean.

programme.title: Baywatch - Broken Promises
programme.desc: "Broken Promises" - To avoid jail, Danny joins Team Baywatch. Leigh doesn't trust him. Kekoa battles her father over her lifeguard career and moves out. JD, Zack and Jason hustle two gorgeous women who turn out to be con artists who turn the tables on them.

programme.title: Baywatch - Dream Girl
programme.desc: "Dream Girl" - Jenna convinces ruthless Councilman McKenna to close the Training Center. Sean suspends Zack after he severely injures JD during a rescue. Kekoa expresses her deep love for JD – but to Leigh! Zack sees a ghostly woman from his dreams.

programme.title: Baywatch - The Cage
programme.desc: "The Cage" - Sean confronts a "shark tour" operator dangerously dumping chum to lure sharks. A tourist who wants to be a hero to impress his son keeps interfering with Jason's rescues. JD and Kekoa try to keep their passionate relationship a secret.

programme.title: Baywatch - Ben
programme.desc: "Ben" - Sean's incredible guilt after a surfing accident leads to a crisis of faith. Zack has to choose between loyalty to his Baywatch teammates and his competitive ambitions.

programme.title: Baywatch - Ties that Bind
programme.desc: "Ties that Bind" - Zack is devastated when Sean promotes Carrie instead of him. Zack and Jason befriend a man and his teenage daughter who harbor a dangerous secret. Zack supplies a boat to escape to Maui, but disaster strikes before they get there.

programme.title: Baywatch - Black Widow
programme.desc: "Black Widow" - Leigh suspects Sasha, an attractive tourist, of murdering her husband. Betraying Leigh, Jason seduces Sasha with shocking results! Sean is shocked when he discovers the truth about his ex-wife's visit to Hawaii.

programme.title: Baywatch - Ex-Files
programme.desc: "Ex-Files" - A series of fake rescue calls puts Sean, Jenna and Zack’s lives in danger. Jenna replaces Councilman McKenna, giving her the power to shut down the Training Center! JD tries to get Kekoa’s father to bless their relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch - The Stalker
programme.desc: "The Stalker" - Carrie rescues a spearfisherman who starts obsessively stalking her. Sean, Jason and Zack save her from his deadly pursuit, but can Carrie feel safe saving strangers again? Sean is jealous of Sam dating Leigh, but Leigh has doubts about Sam.

programme.title: Baywatch - Father Faust
programme.desc: "Father Faust" - Baywatch faces two bizarre lawsuits. Kekoa’s father wants her to break up with JD and quit lifeguarding. Zack runs the new Junior Lifeguards program. A government Investigation puts Sean’s job, and the future of the Training Center in jeopardy.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Chapel of Love
programme.desc: "Chapel of Love" - On a particularly lonely Valentine's Day, the men of "21 Jump Street" play poker and exchange bad date stories.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - I'm Okay, You Need Work
programme.desc: "I'm Okay, You Need Work" - Hanson investigates allegations that teens are being mistreated in a private rehabilitation program for drug and alcohol abuse.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Orpheus 3.3
programme.desc: "Orpheus 3.3" - An armed gunman takes Hanson and Amy hostage in a supermarket.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Champagne High
programme.desc: "Champagne High" - Hanson, Penhall and Hoffs go undercover to solve a case involving multiple incidents of shoplifting and a stolen Porsche.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Brother Hanson and the Miracle of Renner's Pond
programme.desc: "Brother Hanson and the Miracle of Renner's Pond" - Hanson investigates an arson case involving a book burning and a science teacher that wants to teach creationism.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Raising Marijuana
programme.desc: "Raising Marijuana" - Hoffs goes undercover as a drug dealer's girlfriend but gets a little too close. Meanwhile, Penhall and Ioki pose as "twins" who want to help ship drugs.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Best Years of Your Life
programme.desc: "Best Years of Your Life" - Hanson and Penhall deal with a suicide while investigating a series of home break-ins.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Cory and Dean Got Married
programme.desc: "Cory and Dean Got Married" - Penhall and Hoffs work on a special detail assignment to transport a juvenile offender.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - School's Out
programme.desc: "School's Out" - Hanson investigates a series of bathroom bombings and the team disperses when the Jump Street Program is suspended for the summer.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - The Currency We Trade In
programme.desc: "The Currency We Trade In" - Penhall works on a Major Crimes case with his new partner, Fitzgerald. The case involves allegations of child abuse against a public figure.

programme.title: That Girl

programme.title: That Girl

programme.title: That Girl

programme.title: That Girl

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - A Mother's Love

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - Ashes to Ashes

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - Fighting for the Truth
programme.desc: "Fighting for the Truth" - An employee is found dead in a restaurant kitchen. Clues found near the body include an empty cash register, a knife and a trail of blood splotches leading to a vandalized car in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - Dying to Be Young
programme.desc: "Dying to Be Young" - A healthy 53-year-old woman is found dead in bed. After performing an autopsy and taking blood and tissue samples, Dr. G cannot find the cause of death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - Death on the Road
programme.desc: "Death on the Road" - A man is found dead in a motel room due to multiple shotgun wounds. Dr. G proves the scene isn’t what it seems.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - The Mourning After

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - Prescription for Change

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - Burning Questions
programme.desc: "Burning Questions" - Recent college grad Robert Terrible is out drinking at a club with friends celebrating. At 3am, he realizes he better call it a night and heads to the nearby garage where he parked his car.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - A Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: "A Fatal Attraction" - It’s an early Sunday morning when a local resident decides to take a short-cut through the church parking lot. Walking past a lone car, the resident can’t believe his eyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - The Things Men Do
programme.desc: "The Things Men Do" - It is 3am and Deputy Torres is cruising a Texas highway when he suddenly spots a crushed pick-up truck along the side of the road. Trapped inside is the lifeless body of 24-year-old Luis Reyes.

programme.title: Innerlocs Outthere - Innerlocs Outthere - "Brokey"
programme.desc: Justin Merkel has been hunting a specific piece of property his entire life. He has a choice to make on a buck he knows so well. Will Brokey get a free pass or will the property go up for sale. Its a Tennessee showdown with a bittersweet ending.

programme.title: Team200 - Team200 - "The Perfect Storm for Giant Whitetails"
programme.desc: Is there a “Perfect Storm” for killing the biggest bucks in your area?

programme.title: Full Strut - Full Strut - "Level Playing Field"
programme.desc: Brandon tends to be behind the camera most of the time filming Mike across the country, After Mike having a very successful trip to Kansas he surprises Brandon with being the first up to bat to get after his first ever Rio! After things starting off pretty tough they make a decision to level the playing field!

programme.title: Small Town Hunting - Small Town Hunting - "Missouri Deer Opener"
programme.desc: Opening weekend of rifle season in Missouri and we are back with Missouri Hunting and Fishing Adventures looking for a couple bucks to play the game!

programme.title: Storytellers - Storytellers - "Run-N-Gun Adventures"
programme.desc: The Texas Gulf Coast offers an array of opportunities to experience the outdoors. From fishing to waterfowl, we have found that every hunt gives us a chance to experience other people's stories. On this hunt, we learned not only about the incredible adventures that take place at Run-N-Gun, but also about a Texas based organization changing the lives of young people.

programme.title: Full Strut - Full Strut - "Level Playing Field"
programme.desc: Brandon tends to be behind the camera most of the time filming Mike across the country, After Mike having a very successful trip to Kansas he surprises Brandon with being the first up to bat to get after his first ever Rio! After things starting off pretty tough they make a decision to level the playing field!

programme.title: Browning Films - Browning Films - "Pheasants in Any Weather"
programme.desc: Join us on as two hunting women tackle the expansive R&R ranch in South Dakota to chase pheasants.

programme.title: Blood Origins - Blood Origins - "Fighter: Rachel Hogan"
programme.desc: Lyme disease could not hold her down.

programme.title: Blood Origins - Blood Origins - "Perspectives: Lisa Kroger"
programme.desc: As hunters, we need to understand the why behind our hunt.

programme.title: Blood Origins - Blood Origins - "Family: Kim Rogers"
programme.desc: You make you a hunter.

programme.title: Blood Origins - Blood Origins - "Perspectives: Margit Axelrad"
programme.desc: As hunters, we need to fully understand why we hunt & hear the perspectives of non-hunters as well.

programme.title: The Raven Project - The Raven Project - "Last Ditch Effort"
programme.desc: With everything breaking down Dustin and Randy head to an auction to hopefully save their weekend plans of getting seed into the ground.

programme.title: Local Lines - Local Lines - "How It All Started"
programme.desc: In this episode Captain Brandon Branch decided to go back to his roots and fish with a long time friend Laremy Strickland. They've been fishing together for over 10 years now and on this episode they'll be competing to see who can catch the biggest bag.

programme.title: Modern Fishing - Modern Fishing - "Panamanian Fishing Paradise Part 1"
programme.desc: Jared returns to one of his beloved fishing destinations Panama. Jared managed to run into a massive yellowfin bait ball on his last trip, so hopes are high for this year's haul. Though it's slow goings at the start, the crew finds out that Panama always delivers on the yellowfin

programme.title: Guiding Flow - Guiding Flow - "Critical Migrations: Menhaden"
programme.desc: Capt. Benny Blanco and Capt. Brandon Cyr travel from Miami to Boston to understand the massive importance of a healthy menhaden fishery. They target tarpon, bonefish, striped bass, and tuna along the way

programme.title: Stomping Grounds - Stomping Grounds - "Fishing Florida's Backcountry Wilderness"
programme.desc: Host Ryan McVinney takes Boat Trader fans on an indepth exploration of Florida flats fishing deep in the backcountry of Islamorada. Featuring Captain Eric Lund, a Wall Street Broker turned backcountry fishing guide, this episode reveals the key design features of the world’s best flats skiffs and how they are built for targeting some of the most exciting sportfish species on the planet. Also, covered are bay boats and their versatility for families exploring Florida’s coastal waterways, along with a detailed study of fish species and wildlife in the region. Some of the area’s most beautiful and secret locales show why Islamorada has earned the nickname of the Sportfish Capital of The World.

programme.title: Reel Life Adventures - Reel Life Adventures - "Dry Tortugas"
programme.desc: Tucker and JC Carlson Tucker and JC Carlson explore the Dry Tortugas and Fort Jefferson out of Key West in their brand new Yellowfin center console. The boys learn about Florida Keys history and experience red hot fishing for permit, cobia and more.

programme.title: Gale Force Twins - Gale Force Twins - "Our Final Catch Fishing For 4 Days And 3 Nights"
programme.desc: It's the FINAL morning. The sun hasn't risen yet but the mates are hard at work transferring the fish into bins in order to properly sort and distribute it to the anglers. As the sun begins to rise the anglers gather around with their coolers ready to collect their fish! After the coolers are full we say our goodbyes and head home but the work is NOT over yet....we still have to fillet our catch!

programme.title: Into the Blue - Into The Blue - "Bottom Bite Out West"
programme.desc: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger find themselves in a hot bottom bite out of Key West.

programme.title: Sporting Classics - Sporting Classics - "Top of the Flyway"
programme.desc: Its an annual pilgrimage at the as Chris Dorsey and brother Joe venture to Alberta to catch the beginning of North America's annual waterfowl migration.

programme.title: Black Cloud - Black Cloud - "Chasing Washington Green | Duck Hunting at Eagle Lakes"
programme.desc: The fun continues in Washington, and the green just keeps falling from the sky. Dr. Duck and Billy Campbell continue their father-and-son duck hunt in Washington state with Eagle Lakes Outfitters. Let's go.

programme.title: Black Cloud - Black Cloud - "Dry - Field Pacific Honkers | Last - Chance Washington Ducks"
programme.desc: Dr. Duck and Billy Campbell wrap up their father-son duck-cation in Washington. They mow 'em down. Then, the guys switch gears to honkers in a dry field.

programme.title: Barbed - Barbed - "What is Bowfishing"
programme.desc: The Team explains the basics of Bowfishing.

programme.title: Barbed - Barbed - "Common Carp"
programme.desc: What is a Common Carp? We explain the basic fundamentals for bowfishing the common carp

programme.desc: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.

programme.title: Stroked Stock Mopar Magnum
programme.desc: We show what happens when our 360 Magnum engine gets fifty extra cubic inches from a forged stroker kit.

programme.title: Upgrading the Stroked Mopar Magnum

programme.title: Building a Hot Rod LQ9

programme.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

programme.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 Bottom End Build

programme.title: Turbocharging the GM 4.3L V6

programme.title: Compression Obsession
programme.desc: We just can’t stop searching for more power from our Small Block Chevy!

programme.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan
programme.desc: We do something never done before: build 2 identical 454 Big Block Chevys to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!

programme.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

programme.desc: What can the Prince of Pasta do with giant lobster in this battle against Makoto Osada?

programme.title: Make this Tonight
programme.desc: Chef Derrell Smith might be a master of meatballs, but in this episode, he shows us that vegetarian food can be down-right soul satisfying. This drool-worthy menu features Kale Pesto Mac and Cheese, Sweet Potato Jamaican Patties with Salsa Verde, and everyone’s favorite, Banana Pudding.

programme.title: Make this Tonight
programme.desc: Filipino cuisine might be best known for its meat-centric dishes, but Chef Charles Olalia has the inside scoop on taking your favorite Filipino flavors and transforming them into masterful vegetarian dishes.

programme.title: Make this Tonight
programme.desc: On this veg-only menu, his outrageous “Butcher’s Son Burger” complete with plant-based “Bacon” Onion Jam, Quick Pickled Onions, Smoked Paprika & Lime Aioli, Salmoriglio dressed Watercress and the ultimate umami bombs: Seasoned Sweet Potato Fries.

programme.title: Make this Tonight
programme.desc: Chef Nyesha spent years helping her Korean grandmother in the kitchen. In this episode, she is sharing them with you, along with a few dishes inspired by those Korean flavors.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Everyone loves carbs! Endlessly versatile, cheap, and super filling - Frankie shows you tricks for pasta, pizza dough, and delicious, easy ramen meals that aren't soup.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Who knew potatoes are not only affordable, but nutrient rich? Frankie is cookin’ up 3 potato dishes that are guaranteed to fill you up, and later a trio of delicious pancakes with a surprising twist.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Prepping meals at home is cheaper and way more nutritious! Frankie makes portable breakfasts for the work week and forays into the stuffed dough of different cultures.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: You don't have to travel half way around the world to try a different cuisine - Italian and Filipino foods are accessible right here, right now.

programme.title: If These Meals Could Talk
programme.desc: Chef Mary San Pablo shares three dishes that define her culinary journey, a Filipino trio of Lumpia Shanghai, the pig’s head dish Sisig and finishing with brown crab arroz caldo, a risotto-like dish served at her pop-up Luto.

programme.title: If These Meals Could Talk
programme.desc: Chef and food writer Clodagh McKenna makes the three dishes close to her heart: baked eggs with ham and cheese alongside her ‘Daily Happy Juice’, pasta amore and honey-roasted carrots with torn burrata and salsa rustica.

programme.title: If These Meals Could Talk
programme.desc: Chef Anna Haugh cooks up her three defining dishes: her father’s lamb chops, pasta peperonata and oat-crusted hake with smoked mackerel chowder.

programme.title: If These Meals Could Talk
programme.desc: Chef Michelle Trusselle makes the three dishes close to her heart: her mum’s Caribbean chicken curry, braised beef with buttery mashed potato and nutmeg brioche from her supper club Myristica.

programme.title: Sunday Sessions
programme.desc: This week is all about boujee sandwiches. In today's episode, Big Has breaks down a lobster to make the perfect lobster roll from start to finish. And don't forget the buttery, crispy smashed potatoes!

programme.title: Sunday Sessions
programme.desc: This week's episode is all about an Italian classic with a Big Has twist. This spaghetti vongole with nduja isn't traditional but it's spicy, seafood-y, and will make you feel like you're on holiday. Plus, it comes together in just a few minutes.

programme.title: Sunday Sessions
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine Italian, French, and Spanish? Big Has' Pork Chop with Lentils and Romesco, of course. Smoky, vibrant, and oh-so simple, it feels just like a hug from your nan.

programme.title: Frankie vs. the Internet
programme.desc: As summer heats up, the creators sweat it out in the kitchen putting an original spin on corn ribs and a transforming watermelon into a savory dish. Who will whip up this year’s hottest recipe?

programme.title: Frankie vs. the Internet
programme.desc: Baking videos send our social media feeds in a frenzy and we can’t seem to get enough. Watch as creators impress the judges with a show stopping focaccia, then pay tribute to the mini pancake cereal trend by concocting their own unique cereal.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef - Rice Episode with Chef Michael Cummings
programme.desc: Chef Michael Cummings gets his hands into the mix cooking up the versatile grain – rice. His masterpiece is risotto and the rice is his canvass. From appetizer to dessert, chef unveils his collection of trade secrets.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef - Chocolate Episode with Chef Tim McRoberts
programme.desc: Chocolate is the thing that dreams are made of - rich, sweet, and sexy. Chef Tim McRoberts opens our eyes to the techniques of working with chocolate.

programme.title: Road Grill - Skydiving
programme.desc: Matt and the Team “drop in” on a group of thrill seeking skydivers at a Skydiving Jamboree. They let the BBQs rip and grill up three different kinds of wings – smoked, jerked and ‘suicide hot’. Then they cool things down with an asparagus cucumber salad.

programme.title: Road Grill - Go Karting
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team put the pedal to the metal at the Go Kart Track. They crank up the heat on the grills and pull out all the stops making Summertime Pizza, Sticky BBQ Chicken, Smoked Turkey Pastrami Sandwiches and a Summer Mellon Ball Salad.

programme.title: A is for Apple - Olives and Onions
programme.desc: After picking “O,” Chef Robert Jewell makes French onion soup and olive chicken. Next he’s challenged to use onions and olives in one awesome dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple - Pork and Pineapple
programme.desc: Chef Leah Wildman’s pork and pineapple challenge brings about roast pork, caramelized pineapple polenta cake, and a fun dish using both ingredients.

programme.title: One World Kitchen - Introducing Pailin
programme.desc: Host Pailin Chongchitnant introduces us to some of her favourite and simple Thai dishes like Hot and Sour Soup and a decadent Beef Panang Curry.

programme.title: One World Kitchen - Fresh Argentinian Food
programme.desc: Argentinian host, Natalia Machado, exquisitely prepares delicious dishes from Argentina including lamb two different ways.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef - Vegetables with Rene Rodriguez
programme.desc: Bored with broccoli and boiled potatoes? Well Chef Rodriguez will show you how to make your veggies more interesting. Radishes and celery, asparagus and potatoes cooked with the sous-vide technique are all in his repertoire.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef - Fruits and Berries with Ned Bell
programme.desc: The best thing about Summer is fruit and berries. Ned Bell shows off berries to their best advantage and reveals the tricks to keeping that bursting summer flavour throughout the winter.

programme.title: Fish the Dish - Beer and Wine
programme.desc: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts gets casual and formal with monkfish and clam recipes that feature some of his favorite libations – beer and wine.

programme.title: Fish the Dish - Nutty
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts is making a cookbook all about fish. Here he cooks up some swordfish and scallop recipes that feature some of his favorite nuts.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian - Energy Boost

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian - Veggies Galore
programme.desc: Desiree Nielsen shows how beets can make the icing on a delectable cupcake vibrant and delicious.

programme.title: License to Grill - Nothing But Chicken
programme.desc: Rob demonstrates how to do chicken up with style on the grill. He and his friends enjoy a poultry feast with BBQ rotisserie chicken, grilled flattened chicken and delicious smoked sides.

programme.title: License to Grill - The Blind Date and Garlic
programme.desc: The girls set Robs lifelong bachelor buddy up on a blind date and Rob decides to bbq mega garlic. Grilled veggies with garlic anchovy dip, grilled trout wrapped in Proscuitto with a roasted garlic mayo and a fresh nicoise salad. Will love blossom in a wake of garlic breath?

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Monster of a Problem
programme.desc: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife. Then, Lou and Lyndah interrupt a seaside party to repo a motorboat away from a gaggle of misguided youths. And, Lou, Froy, and Sonia head to the dirt track to repossess a car from an event promoter. They seem to be able to reason with him, but his monster truck-driving brother with no respect for human life may prove to be a problem.

programme.title: Hooligans and Explosions
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: Heavy Hitters
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane. And, Sonia and Froy face their worst nightmare when a gang of bikers follows them back to the office.

programme.title: Ruffians and Wrestlers
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when they take an order to repossess from a squad of wannabe backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Everybody Just a Child?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Off the Hitch
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Matt & Froy Auto Recovery
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Lou's cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars, but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now he's ready to do the hurting.

programme.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: We Weren't Informed
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Lyndah's Revenge
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior. Finally, the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck, but at what cost does revenge come?

programme.title: El Prisionero
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: That Girl - The Collaborators
programme.desc: "The Collaborators" - Ann and Donald decide to work on a play about her life, but creative differences get in the way.

programme.title: That Girl - When in Rome
programme.desc: "When in Rome" - An Italian movie director spots Ann and wants her to star in his next movie...and perform a nude scene.

programme.title: That Girl - Thanksgiving Comes But Once a Year, Thankfully
programme.desc: "Thanksgiving Comes But Once a Year, Thankfully" - Ann struggles to cook everybody's favorite dishes for a Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: That Girl - The Mailman Cometh
programme.desc: "The Mailman Cometh" - A substitute agent sets Ann up on a publicity date with Dick Shawn, who knows nothing about it.

programme.title: That Girl - It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 1)

programme.title: That Girl - It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 2)
programme.desc: "It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 2)" - Donald is on the edge over Ann's time with Noel Prince, despite her assurances she has no interest in her new boss.

programme.title: That Girl - Twas the Night Before Christmas, You're Under Arrest

programme.title: That Girl - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: "A Friend in Need" - After Ann is injured on a movie set, Donald goes overboard in trying to take care of her.

programme.title: That Girl - Fur All We Know

programme.title: That Girl - The Rivals
programme.desc: "The Rivals" - Another family visit to Ann's parents in Brewster pits Donald against Lou.

programme.title: That Girl - Sixty-Five on the Aisle
programme.desc: "Sixty-Five on the Aisle" - Lou Marie buys theater and train tickets for sixty-five people from Brewster to see Ann in a play. A conflict arises between the producers who do not want them leaving the theater during a scene.

programme.title: That Girl - Call of the Wild
programme.desc: "Call of the Wild" - A commercial director tells Anne she has a face that no housewife would feel threatened by, which makes her wonder if she has any sex appeal.

programme.title: That Girl - The Other Woman
programme.desc: "The Other Woman" - Ann suggests that her father escort Ethel Merman to a formal event, and the tabloids make him look like her new boyfriend.

programme.title: That Girl - He and She and He
programme.desc: "He and She and He" - Still obsessed with Ann, Noel Prince returns to New York to try to get her to marry him.

programme.title: That Girl - Odpdypahimcaifss
programme.desc: "Odpdypahimcaifss" - A scandal erupts when Donald's mother is invited to Ann's place and finds his pants in her closet.

programme.title: That Girl - Great Guy

programme.title: That Girl - The Detective Story
programme.desc: "The Detective Story" - A series of obscene phone calls prompts Ann to call the NYPD, who sends over a detective who seems to be getting a little too close for comfort, especially Donald's.

programme.desc: Award Winning Comedian Nazareth, has been seen by over 40 Million people around the world through live concerts, TV and Radio broadcasts. His list of TV appearances include: Comedy Central, ABC Family, NBC, CBS, and TBN.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Mike Toomey - Welcome to My World
programme.desc: With his Sharp Delivery, quick wit, and unique style, Mike Toomey has been a favorite at comedy clubs and special events since 1982. A Daily performer on The WGN Morning News in Chicago, Mike has appeared in concert with such names as George Carlin, Wayne Newton, Crosby, Stills & Nash, and Reba McIntyre. He has performed on numerous television programs including HBO's U.S. Comedy Arts Festival in Aspen Colorado MTV's Half Hour Comedy Hour and A&E's Comedy on the Road. The Chicago Tribune calls Mike, "One of the funniest and most talented performers to ever work in Chicago." For an evening of uncontrollable laughs, Mike Toomey is a sure choice!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Johnny Beehner - The Flamingo Special
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he’s likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago’s prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Cam Bertrand - Sophisticated Ignorance
programme.desc: Cam shares his outlook on relationships and life through the eyes of a 23-year-old in a way that everyone can relate to. Bringing high energy and witty style that appeals to a wide demographic.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Andrew Sleighter - Breakfast Stealer
programme.desc: Andrew Sleighter started in comedy looking for the perfect funny line to open a biography. Since then, Andrewís laid-back style and clever writing has won him appreciation from fans and respect from his peers. A regular at colleges and comedy clubs across the country, Andrewís also performed at some of the most prestigious comedy festivals in and out of the country including Bumbershoot, Bridgetown, The Cabo Comedy Festival, The Aspen Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull, and the Johnny Carson Great American Comedy Festival. Andrew wrote and blogged for the Sports Show with Norm Macdonald on Comedy Central and was a regular on the MTV prank show Money From Strangers. Heís performed on Nuvo TVís Stand Up & Deliver, Last Comic Standing, and made his late-night stand-up debut on Conan. Andrewís comedy has the ability to reach wide ranges of audiences and works in a diversity of rooms. Reliable and consistent, he rarely ends a show by lighting the stage on fire out of rage. Most importantly, heís constantly fascinated by and eager to keep learning about stand-up.

programme.title: Cleto Rodriguez - Cleto is My Real Name
programme.desc: Rodriguez connects with audiences by relating everyday life experiences. Anything and everything is fair game, from marriage mishaps to the challenges of dieting. His comedy is high-energy, observational and hilarious with a brilliant Latino twist.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Robert Mac - Back to Lake Titicaca
programme.desc: Robert Mac returns to the Dry Bar stage with less smartness, less subtleness, and even more silliness.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Eric O Shea - Life: It's Not Your Fault
programme.desc: Eric O'Shea has been active in the comedy business for 25 years. He has performed in L.A. with Betty White at the Creative Emmy Awards and has appeared on America's Got Talent TV Show. Every year since 1997, Eric has performed an average of 70 shows a year, and has received 7 nominations as the “National College Comedian of the Year”

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Dave Nihill - Documented
programme.desc: Dave is the winner of the prestigious 43rd annual San Francisco Comedy Competition, and runner up in the Moth’s largest US Grandslam storytelling competition.

programme.title: Alex Velluto - Spurious
programme.desc: Like Rocky Balboa, Alex Velluto is the son of an Italian immigrant and brings the same intensity, will, and drive to the comedy stage. In 2016, Alex was voted 'Best Comedian' by City Weekly Magazine and is the winner of the Finger Lakes Comedy Festival in Ithaca, NY. Alex is a regular at Wiseguys Comedy Club where he has headlined and worked with some of the biggest names in comedy. He has also “gone the distance” in many competitions and festivals across the country. Alex was a finalist in the the Funniest Person in Utah competition, and The Salt Lake Comedy Festival stand up competition, has performed at the Idaho Laugh Festival, and Finger Lakes Comedy Festival. In addition to his stand-up comedy, Alex is a co-host of the "Happy Valley Podcast", and is renowned for referring to himself in the third person, and is an excellent writer of comedy bios about himself that everybody likes.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Orlando Baxter - Glorified Baby Sitter
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Rodney Laney - Who is Rodney Laney?
programme.desc: Rodney Laney has completed pilots for Comedy Central, MTV, and A&E. He has been seen on HBO, FOX News Channel’s Red Eye, The Late Late Show on CBS, Comedy Central’s Premium Blend, comedy.tv on the HD channel, two appearances on Gotham Comedy Live AXSTV, and Live in Gotham VR. He has appeared at the prestigious Just for Laughs Comedy Festival Montreal and LOL Lounge TBS Presents A Very Funny Festival: Just for Laughs Chicago.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Maher Matta - Personally Speaking
programme.desc: Born in Lebanon and raised in the American South, Maher Matta jokes about flying while Arab, using Rogaine at fifteen, and working as a state trooper.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Heather Mabbott: I Didn't Mean To Say That
programme.desc: Her quick wit and unique style has dazzled audiences all over the country. Heather is a clean comedian and has performed with some of the best, like Caroline Rhea, Jimmy Walker, Bobcat Goldthwait, Bruce Baum, Sinbad, and many, many more.

programme.desc: What does it look like inside the mind of a machine? See what creativity lies and thrives within, and meet those looking to unleash it. (1) Art in the age of machine intelligence | Refik Anadol (2) The incredible inventions of intuitive AI | Maurice Conti (3) The high-stakes race to make quantum computers work - Chiara Decaroli (4) How AI could compose a personalized soundtrack to your life | Pierre Barreau (5) How do hard drives work? - Kanawat Senanan (6) The mind-bending art of deep time | Katie Paterson

programme.title: The Future of Cities
programme.desc: Discover what's potentially in store for the world's urban hotspots. 1) What a driverless world could look like | Wanis Kabbaj 2) How cities are detoxing transportation | Monica Araya 3) What happens if you cut down all of a city's trees? | Stefan Al 4) How carbon capture networks could help curb climate change | Bas Sudmeijer 5) How to turn around a city | Irma L. Olguin Jr.

programme.title: School Smarts

(1) Every kid needs a champion | Rita Pierson (2) Do IQ tests actually measure intelligence? (3)Teach girls bravery, not perfection | Reshma Saujani (4) How to escape education's death valley | Sir Ken Robinson (5) What percentage of your brain do you use? - Richard E. Cytowic

programme.title: The Business Angle
programme.desc: Insights from the professional world -- from CEOs, entrepreneurs, HR experts, everyday employees and more -- on how to run a successful business and make work life better for everyone. 1) How to build a company where the best ideas win | Ray Dalio 2) Why play is essential for business | Martin Reeves 3) How to spot a pyramid scheme | Stacie Bosley 4) The value of kindness at work | James Rhee 5) What gives a dollar bill its value? - Doug Levinson

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? Get to know yourself a bit better with this collection of thought-provoking ideas. 1) Strange answers to the psychopath test | Jon Ronson 2) How gratitude rewires your brain | Christina Costa 3) What you can do to prevent Alzheimer's | Lisa Genova 4) Why we're more honest with machines than people | Anne Scherer

programme.title: The Future Ahead
programme.desc: Get an awe-inspiring look at the future that awaits with visionaries already predicting, embracing and innovating on the potential of tomorrow. (1) Super speed, magnetic levitation and the vision behind the hyperloop | Josh Giegel (2)The future of psychedelic-assisted psychotherapy | Rick Doblin (3) The world's biggest battery looks nothing like a battery | TED-Ed (4) Siri, Alexa, Google ... what comes next? | Karen Lellouche Tordjman (5) How AI can save our humanity | Kai-Fu Lee

programme.title: Justice By (Re)design
programme.desc: Necessary rethinks and ambitious yet achievable solutions for redesigning systems to work for all people, not just some. 1) How radical hospitality can change the lives of the formerly incarcerated | Reuben Jonathan Miller 2) The problem with the U.S. bail system | Camilo Ramirez 3) Gerrymandering: How drawing jagged lines can impact an election - Christina Greer 4) 3 ways to upgrade democracy for the 21st century | Max Rashbrooke 5) What if you could help decide how the government spends public funds? | Shari Davis

programme.title: Close Up and Personal
programme.desc: Inspiring, life-affirming personal stories. 1) My journey from Marine to actor | Adam Driver 2) Frida Kahlo: The woman behind the legend - Iseult Gillespie 3) The price of shame | Monica Lewinsky 4) How one scientist took on the chemical industry 5) Notes of a native son: the world according to James Baldwin - Christina Greer

programme.title: Secrets of the Wild
programme.desc: Be inspired to go out and rediscover the wonders of the natural world -- and get a deeper understanding of where (and why) the wild things grow. 1) How trees talk to each other | Suzanne Simard 2) Meet the tardigrade, the toughest animal on Earth | Thomas Boothby 3) The unexpected, underwater plant fighting climate change | Carlos M. Duarte 4) Why are sloths so slow? | Kenny Coogan 5) Nature. Beauty. Gratitude. | Louie Schwartzberg 6) How tall can a tree grow? | Valentin Hammoudi

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet

programme.title: Android Cop
programme.desc: In this futuristic, action-packed thriller, a cop and his robotic partner enter the Zone, a forbidden section of the city inhabited by a disease-stricken populace. Together, they discover the real reason everyone is sick, and attempt to stop the illness - with the help of the machine's powerful technology and weaponry.

programme.title: Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: In February 1942 US forces engaged an unidentified flying object above Los Angeles. Now almost 70 years later, the alien invaders have returned.

programme.title: CarGo
programme.desc: A young car learns the importance of family when he embarks on a mission to rescue his father - who's been sent to Clunker Island to be repurposed as junk metal.

programme.title: Dragonquest
programme.desc: After the ruthless Krill (Brian Thompson) harnesses the power of a deadly fire-breathing dragon, he begins a bloody campaign of world domination. From the ashes of a scorched village, Arkadi (Daniel Bonjour), an unassuming farm boy, embarks on an arduous journey to restore the lost pieces of a mystical amulet -- the only weapon powerful enough to destroy Krill. With the help of swordsman Maxim (Marc Singer) and his squire, Katya (Jennifer Dorogi), Arkadi struggles to save the world.

programme.title: Hercules Reborn
programme.desc: When a young man's bride is kidnapped by an evil king, he turns to Hercules for help. The fallen hero has been living in exile, banished for killing his family, but the young man's courage inspires Hercules. Together, they fight to rescue the bride and reclaim Hercules' honor.

programme.desc: The future looks bright. Stories that leave you feeling better than before.

programme.title: Bright Star
